:mod:`The Service class` 
========================

.. module:: services.service

.. class:: Service(object)

    The **Service** class is not intended to be used by the user directly in normal
    circumstances. It subclasses twisted.web.resource to handle connnection requests.

Private definition
------------------

    .. method:: Service(name,services,pages,response)

    	:param name: name of the service
    	:type name: string
    	:param services: hierarchical dictionary containing the registration of different names and assciated actions for services.
    	:param pages: hierarchical dictionary containing the registration of different names and assciated actions for serving pages.
    	:response: instance of the class handling the required type of response.

    .. method:: render_POST(request)
    .. method:: render_GET(request)

    	These methods implement the twisted required methods to handle respectively POST and
    	GET requests. Besides handling the right response type (defined when creating
    	a :class:`Services.Server.Server` object), it handles data decoding and errors.
    	
    .. method:: find_handler(postpath,handlers):
    	
    	Works recursively to find the right handler (if defined) for the current url.
